titleStmt.title: SII 41.477: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 477. (A.R. No. 690 of 1905.) Ramanathapuram Dindigal Taluk, Madura District. On the rock at Ramanathapuram near Dindigul.

summary.p: Registers the building of a tank by Parāntakapaḷḷi-Vēḷān alias Nakkam Puḷḷaṉ, who accompanied the king in his expedition (yāttirai) against Iḍavai in the Chōḻa country. This Puḷḷaṉ had begun the excavation of an irrigation tank in his name, called Puḷḷaṉēri, strengthened the banks with stone revetment and fixed the sluice therefor; but he died before the project could be completed. The work was then completed by Puḷḷaṉ Nakkaṉ, evidently his son, with the help of the mason named Vaḍugan-Kūṟṟaṉ and his son. Puḷḷa Nakkaṉ gifted to the masons some wet land in both the divisions of Paḷḷi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkomāṟañcaṭaiyaṉoṭu coḻanāṭṭiṭavaiyāt
tirai ceyta parāntakappaḷḷiveḷāṉā Iṉanak
kampuḷḷaṉṟaṉ perāṟ puḷḷaṉeri Eṉṟu
kuḷamākki kaṟkotik kumuḻi ceyvittuk kuṟai
ppaṇi niṉṟatu muṟṟup peṟuttāṉ puḷḷana
kkaṉ . ṉatu ceyta taccaṉ vaṭukaṅkūṟṟaṉ . A
vaṉ makaṉ kuṟaippaṇi muṟṟu vikka puḷḷana
kkaṉ Avaṉukkuk kāṇiyāka Aṭṭiṉa pūmip paḷ
ḷināṭṭiraṇṭu kūṟṟilum Ūrkkuḷattukkiḻ
talainīr pāṭukālloro vayal patak
ku nel .
Digital edition of SII 41.477 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
